case_title: FISCHER, BARBARA M. vs. BOB DEAN ENTERPRISES et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FISCHER, BARBARA M. AS TO DEFENDANT BOB DEAN ENTERPRISES SAN FRANCISCO TOURIST GUIDE, A PARTNERSHIP OF BOB DEAN AND BARBARA KILROY DEAN, BOB KILROY, BARBARA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FISCHER, BARBARA M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOB DEAN ENTERPRISES SAN FRANCISCO TOURIST GUIDE, A PARTNERSHIP OF BOB DEAN AND BARBARA KILROY DEAN, BOB KILROY, BARBARA $7,104.53 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,187.53
